name: Laptop Pro X
description: A high-performance laptop with 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD, and a 15.6-inch display. Ideal for work, coding, and gaming.

name: Budget Smartphone
description: An affordable smartphone with a 6.5-inch display, 4GB RAM, and a long-lasting battery. Great for everyday use.

name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and immersive sound quality.

name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: RGB backlit mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX switches. Perfect for gamers and typists who want tactile feedback.

name: 4K Ultra HD Smart TV
description: 55-inch 4K Smart TV with HDR, built-in streaming apps, and Dolby Atmos sound. Transform your living room experience.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Adjustable ergonomic chair with lumbar support, breathable mesh back, and armrests. Designed for long work sessions.

name: Fitness Smartwatch
description: Water-resistant smartwatch with heart rate monitor, GPS tracking, sleep analysis, and 7-day battery life.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Compact waterproof Bluetooth speaker with 360-degree sound, 12-hour playtime, and rugged design for outdoor adventures.
